element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic platforming foundation; easily disposed barrier
Can fill holes with ice, confined to single floor layer; requires timing awareness
Crosses multiple ice layers; adds vertical threat dimension and timing complexity
Forces path choice and navigation puzzle-solving
Adds directional momentum challenge; requires compensatory jumping
Combines platforming with timing; later variants move diagonally or with wind effects
Hazard timing; can form on any platform type
Appears when players take too long; forces screen upward; eliminates stalling strategy
No enemies but trickier jumps and multiple moving platforms; only location for vegetable recovery

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching bonus stage at peak (40-second window, no enemies)
Defeating or avoiding enemies to clear a layer
typical_tension_triggers: Enemy speed increases after early mountains
White Bear appearance (enforces upward screen movement)
Combination of multiple enemy types on same layer
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty wave pattern with enemy acceleration; tension builds through accumulated threats (enemies + hazards + platforms) then releases at bonus stage; White Bear eliminates downtime and prevents camping strategy

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Vegetables distributed across mountains, with eggplants only at peaks; single corn piece from fifth bonus stage grants extra life (progression gate)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Mountain 1 introduces all basic mechanics (standard ice, Topi, Nitpicker, basic jumping); dull ice blocks pose minimal threat; establishes vocabulary without overwhelming
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Indestructible ice blocks force navigation choices; conveyor belt sections add momentum complexity; White Bear appears to enforce pace; enemy speeds increase cumulatively
difficulty_curve.late_game: Combination of all threats (multiple enemy types, falling icicles, moving platforms); bonus stages feature trickier jump sequences with no enemy respite; cumulative speed increases compound difficulty
notable_spikes: Introduction of White Bear (eliminates stalling; forces upward screen pressure)
Conveyor belt ice combined with other obstacles
Multi-enemy encounters on single layer with limited safe platforms
Bonus stage time limit (40 seconds) intersecting with complex platforming

notable_level_patterns.description: Each mountain consists of 8 layers of colored ice plus a bonus stage at peak. Layer progression is mandatory upward; eight mountains lead to Super Bonus Stage in arcade version
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mountain 1-8 (NES); Mountains 1-24 then Super Bonus, then 25-48 (VS. Arcade)

notable_level_patterns.description: Topi confined to single floor (manageable threat scope); Nitpicker crosses multiple layers (vertical threat); White Bear appears only when pace slackens (enforces momentum)
Peak stage removes enemies entirely, replacing threat with precision platforming and time pressure; only location to recover vegetables and access extra life condition
After early mountains cleared, all enemies' speeds increase; no explicit difficulty select; difficulty rises through entity behavior tuning rather than level redesign
